subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Thee, O Thou Who art the Possessor ofall names and Fashioner of the heavens, inasmuch as Thou hast remembered me
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقتی اقبلی الی الافق الاعلی ثم استمعی ندآء ربک مالک الاسماء انه ینادیک و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant
